task.test_code:
# Test 1: Simple wildcard
assert glob_match('*.txt', 'hello.txt') == True, 'Simple wildcard failed'
assert glob_match('*.txt', 'hello.py') == False, 'Wildcard rejection failed'

# Test 2: Question mark
assert glob_match('?.txt', 'a.txt') == True, '? match failed'
assert glob_match('?.txt', 'ab.txt') == False, '? should match exactly one'

# Test 3: Simple braces
assert glob_match('{a,b,c}', 'a') == True, 'Simple brace a failed'
assert glob_match('{a,b,c}', 'b') == True, 'Simple brace b failed'
assert glob_match('{a,b,c}', 'd') == False, 'Simple brace rejection failed'

# Test 4: Braces with prefix/suffix
assert glob_match('file.{js,ts}', 'file.js') == True, 'Brace with suffix failed'
assert glob_match('file.{js,ts}', 'file.ts') == True, 'Brace with suffix ts failed'
assert glob_match('file.{js,ts}', 'file.py') == False, 'Brace rejection failed'

# Test 5: THE KEY BUG - Nested braces
assert glob_match('{a,{b,c}}', 'a') == True, 'Nested brace a failed'
assert glob_match('{a,{b,c}}', 'b') == True, 'Nested brace b failed'
assert glob_match('{a,{b,c}}', 'c') == True, 'Nested brace c failed'
assert glob_match('{a,{b,c}}', 'd') == False, 'Nested brace rejection failed'

# Test 6: Deeper nesting
assert glob_match('{a,{b,{c,d}}}', 'c') == True, 'Deep nested c failed'
assert glob_match('{a,{b,{c,d}}}', 'd') == True, 'Deep nested d failed'
assert glob_match('{a,{b,{c,d}}}', 'a') == True, 'Deep nested a failed'

# Test 7: Braces combined with wildcards
assert glob_match('{src,lib}/*.js', 'src/app.js') == True, 'Brace + wildcard failed'
assert glob_match('{src,lib}/*.js', 'lib/util.js') == True, 'Brace + wildcard lib failed'
assert glob_match('{src,lib}/*.js', 'test/app.js') == False, 'Brace + wildcard rejection failed'

# Test 8: Escaped characters
assert glob_match('hello\\*', 'hello*') == True, 'Escaped * failed'
assert glob_match('hello\\*', 'helloX') == False, 'Escaped * should be literal'

# Test 9: Multiple brace groups
assert glob_match('{a,b}-{x,y}', 'a-x') == True, 'Multiple brace groups failed'
assert glob_match('{a,b}-{x,y}', 'b-y') == True, 'Multiple brace groups b-y failed'
assert glob_match('{a,b}-{x,y}', 'a-z') == False, 'Multiple brace groups rejection failed'

# Test 10: Empty alternative in braces
assert glob_match('file{,.txt}', 'file') == True, 'Empty alternative for file failed'
assert glob_match('file{,.txt}', 'file.txt') == True, 'Empty alternative for file.txt failed'

# Test 11: Star matches empty string
assert glob_match('a*b', 'ab') == True, '* matching empty failed'
assert glob_match('a*b', 'aXYZb') == True, '* matching multiple failed'

# Test 12: Pattern with no special characters
assert glob_match('hello', 'hello') == True, 'Literal match failed'
assert glob_match('hello', 'world') == False, 'Literal rejection failed'

print('All glob_match tests passed!')
